events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: missing shims under the base plate leaves the column relying on anchor bolts alone for load path with no verified level bearing surface — a high-risk, non-compliant condition per AISC 303 and OSHA 1926 Subpart R. Decision is `fail`; immediate actions are to halt further loading, install proper shim packs, verify plumb/level, inspect anchor bolts, maintain bracing, and only grout after re-inspection.
